prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your blended family forward
items: Schedule a family meeting to establish shared household rules and expectations
Create a shared family calendar that includes all children\
Establish designated spaces for each child in the new blended household
Draft a communication agreement between co-parents about updates, emergencies, and decision-making
Set up consistent bedtime and morning routines that work across both households
Create a family photo wall or memory space that includes all children and family members
